channel.title: Vuejs on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Vuejs on Arrans github.io

item.title: amir20/dozzle
item.description: Realtime log viewer for containers. Supports Docker, Swarm and K8s.

item.title: go-vikunja/vikunja
item.description: The to-do app to organize your life.

item.title: CodesWhat/drydock
item.description: Open source container update monitoring — 23 registries, 20 notification triggers, audit log, OIDC auth, Prometheus metrics, and a modern dashboard.

item.title: TeamPiped/Piped
item.description: An alternative privacy-friendly YouTube frontend which is efficient by design.

item.title: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
item.description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

item.title: LycheeOrg/Lychee
item.description: A great looking and easy-to-use photo-management-system you can run on your server, to manage and share photos.

item.title: TannerMidd/minimal-chat
item.description: MinimalChat is a lightweight, open-source chat application that allows you to interact with various large language models.
